calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2015 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment And To Fix Attorney'S Fees, Against Defendants
Off Calendar Nov-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jonathan Bowne, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS INCORPORATED, a Corporation.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MATEO DAYS, LP, a limited partnership; COOP DAYS, LP, a limited partnership.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 100 dismissed without prejudice.
Barbara Feeberg sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS INCORPORATED, a Corporation, and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:
Judgement against Defendant MATEO DAYS, LLP, a limited partnership:
Damages: $6,593.71
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,202.59
Attorney's Fees: $2,251,75
Costs: $359.96
Judgement against Defendant COOP DAYS, LP, a limited partnership:
Damages: $5,913.92
Pre-Judgment Interest: $821.42
Attorney's Fees: $2,251,75
Costs: $359.96
Counsel for Plaintiff to submit proposed judgment within five days.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2014 Continued To Feb-04-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
